task_completion.description: Verify the agent has accessed the FreeScout application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeScout web interface is visible in a web browser, indicating successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the 'AV Equipment Support' mailbox.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'AV Equipment Support' mailbox is selected in the left sidebar or displayed as the current active mailbox header.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent located the correct conversation in the list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The conversation list shows an entry with the subject 'Projector installation request for Conference Room B - Building 4' from the customer 'Marcus Reed'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the target conversation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The specific conversation thread is open on the screen, displaying the full subject 'Projector installation request for Conference Room B - Building 4' at the top.

task_completion.description: Verify the conversation status has been changed to 'Closed'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the target conversation, the status indicator/badge shows 'Closed', the status dropdown is set to 'Closed', or there is a system timeline event stating the conversation was closed.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the FreeScout web interface rather than using API/curl commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window is visible displaying the FreeScout UI, with no terminal windows showing curl or HTTP requests.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database commands to change the status.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing MySQL/PostgreSQL prompts or database update queries are visible.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual status.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element) pane is not open, and the UI looks like a standard FreeScout interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target conversation subject is exactly 'Projector installation request for Conference Room B - Building 4'. The target status name to look for is 'Closed'. The conversation initially starts as 'Active'.
